## How to add a chain

See [`../runbooks/ADD_CHAIN.md`](../runbooks/ADD_CHAIN.md) for the full process. Short version:

1. Deploy Hyperlane core on your chain (`deployer/_run_deploy.sh deploy_evm_core.mjs`).
2. `cp -r chains/_template chains/<your-key>` — fill in `chain.yaml`.
3. Open a PR. CI runs `verify_bridge_health.mjs --chain <your-key>` to confirm declared addresses are real on-chain.
4. Core team reviews + merges. Existing operators `git pull && drive.sh up` to pick up the new chain.
